mechanism: Inhibits multiple kinases including FLT3 to reduce AML cell proliferation
additional_notes: Approved for FLT3+ AML; MOLM-13 often responsive

mechanism: Inhibits FLT3 and AXL signaling, active in FLT3-ITD AML models
additional_notes: Approved for FLT3+ AML; noted strong activity in FLT3-ITD lines (e.g., MOLM-13)

mechanism: Potent inhibition of FLT3 signaling
additional_notes: Approved in some regions; described as classic MOLM-13 tool/therapy

mechanism: Inhibits multiple kinases including FLT3; suppresses proliferation signaling in AML
additional_notes: Approved for RCC/HCC; used off-label in AML

mechanism: Potent multikinase inhibition including activity against FLT3 variants; used in resistance contexts
additional_notes: Approved for CML/ALL; noted for resistance contexts

mechanism: Inhibits SRC/ABL family kinases; can suppress AML signaling in subsets
additional_notes: Approved for CML/ALL

mechanism: Inhibits MEK1/2 in the RAS/MAPK pathway
additional_notes: Rationale: RAS/MAPK-driven AML subsets

mechanism: Inhibits mTORC1 to downregulate PI3K/AKT/mTOR signaling
additional_notes: Approved in cancers/transplant; PI3K/AKT/mTOR axis common in AML

mechanism: Inhibits mTORC1 to reduce growth/proliferation signaling
additional_notes: Approved for RCC; similar rationale to everolimus

mechanism: Selective inhibition of BCL-2 to promote apoptosis
additional_notes: Approved in CLL and AML combinations; described as strong anti-AML in many contexts

mechanism: Inhibits BCL-XL and BCL-2 to promote apoptosis
additional_notes: Alternative name: ABT-263; clinical stage; suggested for venetoclax-resistant states

mechanism: Reported interference with STAT5/STAT signaling
additional_notes: Approved antipsychotic; solubility limits noted

mechanism: Microtubule disruption/antimitotic effects; reported anti-leukemia activity
additional_notes: Approved anthelmintic; solubility limits noted

mechanism: Modulates WNT/β-catenin and STAT3 and acts as a mitochondrial uncoupler
additional_notes: AML activity reports; solubility/handling concerns noted

category: Aldehyde dehydrogenase (ALDH) inhibitor / repurposed addiction therapy
mechanism: Induces proteostasis/redox stress; cytotoxicity often copper-dependent
additional_notes: Approved for alcoholism; noted as often Cu2+-dependent (± copper condition)

mechanism: Inhibits thioredoxin reductase leading to ROS/redox stress
additional_notes: Approved for rheumatoid arthritis; AML sensitivity reports mentioned

mechanism: Induces redox/proteotoxic stress
additional_notes: Approved for APL; broader AML effects at higher doses noted

mechanism: Weak HDAC inhibition leading to epigenetic modulation and differentiation effects
additional_notes: Approved antiepileptic

mechanism: Inhibits autophagy via lysosomal inhibition
additional_notes: Approved antimalarial; described as having combination potential in AML

mechanism: Inhibits mitochondrial complex I and activates AMPK; anti-proliferative in some AML models
additional_notes: Approved for type 2 diabetes
